title: Check out functionality
body:
User Story: Complete Checkout on SauceDemo

As a registered customer
I want to add items to my cart and complete a purchase
So that I can successfully place an order

Acceptance Criteria

1. User can log in with valid credentials
2. User can browse the product catalog and add items to the cart
3. Cart icon reflects the correct item count
4. User can proceed to checkout and fill in shipping details
5. User can review the order summary before confirming
6. User sees a confirmation screen after successful checkout
